Minor'S Compromise.
Off Calendar Oct-05-2004 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Minor's Compromise hearing this day.
Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Yvonne Lee.
Trent J. Thornley, Esq. for Petitioners: Joy L. Jeffries and Charlie Armstrong, present as Guardian at litem for: Charviera Armstrong, a minor Claimant, were sworn and examined.
On the basis of evidence received, the Petition is granted and compromise of $20,000.00 is approved.
Total of the proceeds, to be used for purchase of an ANNUITY as described in Attachment "15(b)" in the Order Approving Compromise of Claim, signed in open court.
